libsource.description: Generic connector, double row, 02x08, counter clockwise pin numbering scheme (similar to DIP packge numbering), script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)
High-Speed CAN Transceiver, 1Mbps, 5V supply, Vio pin, -40C to +125C, SOIC-8
Rotary switch, 4-bit encoding, 16 positions, Real code
ARM Cortex-M4 MCU, 64KB flash, 12KB RAM, 72MHz, 2-3.6V, 25 GPIO, LQFP-32
Generic connector, single row, 01x02, script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)

fields.field: Isolated 1W Single Output Isolated DC/DC Converters

property.name: Description
property.value: Isolated 1W Single Output Isolated DC/DC Converters

fields.field: Isolated 1W Single Output Isolated DC/DC Converters

libpart.description: Generic connector, single row, 01x02, script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)
Generic connector, double row, 02x08, counter clockwise pin numbering scheme (similar to DIP packge numbering), script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)
High-Speed CAN Transceiver, 1Mbps, 5V supply, Vio pin, -40C to +125C, SOIC-8
ARM Cortex-M4 MCU, 64KB flash, 12KB RAM, 72MHz, 2-3.6V, 25 GPIO, LQFP-32
Rotary switch, 4-bit encoding, 16 positions, Real code
